attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ORDER_HOLD_ID
,HEADER_ID
,LINE_ID
,HOLD_SOURCE_ID
,HOLD_RELEASE_ID
,GLOBAL_NAME
,CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
,ATTRIBUTE1
,HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT
,CREATED_BY
,CREATION_DATE
,LAST_UPDATED_BY
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,ORG_ID
, USER AS  EDW_UPDATE_USER
,'N' SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT EUOOHA
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND LINE_ID IS NULL
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHA
				WHERE SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = EUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID
AND SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
)

SELECT  
  SSOH.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
     SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE  AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
  COALESCE(GCOHD.NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY         AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SUOOHA.CREATED_BY    AS CREATED_BY_ID_INT,
  SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID   AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD,
  SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY   AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' OR SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
  SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE1 AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
  COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
     COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) ELSE SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID END AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
 
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' 
    ELSE GCOHR.RELEASE_REASON_CODE END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
    
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN CAST(SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE)
  ELSE CASE WHEN SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NULL THEN NULL
                  ELSE 
                     CASE WHEN GCOHR.CREATION_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN   CAST(GCOHR.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) 
                       ELSE CAST(SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE)
                         END 
                           END  
      END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
      
  CASE WHEN GCOHR.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  ELSE NULL END AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
 
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
  ELSE CASE WHEN SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NULL THEN NULL
                  ELSE 
                     CASE WHEN GCOHR.CREATION_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN GCOHR.CREATION_DATE 
                       ELSE SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
                         END 
                           END 
      END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM        ,
  CAST(SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
     SUOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  CAST(CAST(SUOOHA.HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT  AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') as SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' 
    ELSE COALESCE(GCOHR.RELEASE_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') END AS RELEASE_COMMENT,
      COALESCE(GCOHSA.HOLD_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS HOLD_COMMENT
     FROM  
 $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHA
   INNER JOIN 
   (
   $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSO.SS_CD)
 ) 
   ON ( SUOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME )
  INNER  JOIN 
    ( $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_SOURCES_ALL GCOHSA
     INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_DEFINITIONS GCOHD ON 
     (GCOHD.HOLD_ID = GCOHSA.HOLD_ID)
    )
  ON (SUOOHA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID = GCOHSA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID)
  LEFT JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_RELEASES GCOHR 
  ON(SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID = GCOHR.HOLD_RELEASE_ID)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SSOH
  ON ( SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT 
       AND SSOH.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 
       LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT
 CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
 EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
 , EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
  EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
 FROM 
   $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
   ON
    NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
 ) EFU_CR
 ON
 EFU_CR.USER_ID = SUOOHA.CREATED_BY
 AND
 EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT 
 CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
 EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
 EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , 
 EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER  NEU
   ON
    NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
 ) EFU_UPD
 ON
 EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
 AND
 EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
 WHERE SUOOHA.LINE_ID IS NULL
 AND SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME <>'OPL'

UNION ALL 

SELECT  
 SSOH.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
     SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE  AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
  COALESCE(HOLD_DATA.HOLD_NAME ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
  NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY         AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SUOOHA.CREATED_BY    AS CREATED_BY_ID_INT,
  SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID   AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD,
  SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY   AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
  (CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y'  OR HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
  SUOOHA.ATTRIBUTE1 AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
  COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
     COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN CAST (-9999 AS INTEGER) ELSE SUOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID END AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
 
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' 
    ELSE HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_REASON END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
    
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN CAST(SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE)
  ELSE CASE WHEN HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL
                  ELSE 
                     CASE WHEN HOLD_DATA.CREATION_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN   CAST(CAST(CAST(HOLD_DATA.CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19))AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE)
                       ELSE CAST(SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE)
                         END 
                           END  
      END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
      
  CASE WHEN HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  ELSE NULL END AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
 
 CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
  ELSE CASE WHEN HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL
                  ELSE 
                     CASE WHEN HOLD_DATA.CREATION_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN   CAST(CAST(HOLD_DATA.CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19))AS TIMESTAMP(0))
                       ELSE SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
                         END 
                           END 
      END AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM        ,
  CAST(SUOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
     SUOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
  CAST(CAST(CAST(CAST(SUOOHA.HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') as SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
  CASE WHEN SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' 
    ELSE COALESCE(HOLD_DATA.HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') END AS RELEASE_COMMENT,
      COALESCE(HOLD_DATA.HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS HOLD_COMMENT
      FROM  
  $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHA
    INNER JOIN 
    (
    $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSO.SS_CD)
  ) 
    ON ( SUOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME )

   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SSOH
   ON ( SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT 
        AND SSOH.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
  JOIN  (SELECT * FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOPL_HOLD_DATA 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY LAST_UPDATED_DATE DESC)=1 ) HOLD_DATA
   ON(SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = HOLD_DATA.ID)
  
        LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  (
  SELECT
  CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
  EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
  , EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
   EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
  FROM 
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
  LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NEU
    ON
     NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
  ) EFU_CR
  ON
  EFU_CR.USER_ID = SUOOHA.CREATED_BY
  AND
  EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  (
  SELECT 
  CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
  EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
  EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , 
  EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID 
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
  LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER  NEU
    ON
     NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
  ) EFU_UPD
  ON
  EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SUOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
  AND
  EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
  WHERE SUOOHA.LINE_ID IS NULL                       
 AND SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME ='OPL'

SELECT
RANK() OVER
(ORDER BY
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE) + SMHLD_ORD_MAX.MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
SELECT DISTINCT
SUOOHL.ORDER_HOLD_ID AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT ,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CODE
FROM
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SUOOHL.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE SUOOHL.LINE_ID IS NULL
) STHLD_ORD_BK ,
 
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY),0) MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL
FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD ) SMHLD_ORD_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SSOH
WHERE SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT = STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
AND SSOH.SS_CD =STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CODE )

SELECT ORDER_HOLD_ID ,
  ATTRIBUTE1 ,
  CREATION_DATE ,
  HEADER_ID ,
  HOLD_RELEASE_ID ,
  HOLD_SOURCE_ID ,
  LINE_ID ,
  HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT ,
  CREATED_BY ,
  LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
  LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
  ORG_ID ,
  GLOBAL_NAME ,
  CREATE_DATETIME ,
  'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  FROM  
   $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHA
  WHERE
  SUOOHA.LINE_ID IS NULL
  AND SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME <> 'OPL'
 AND(
  NOT EXISTS 
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSO.SS_CD)
  WHERE SUOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME  
  )
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_SOURCES_ALL GCOHSA
  WHERE SUOOHA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID=GCOHSA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID
  AND GCOHSA.HOLD_ID IN (SELECT HOLD_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_DEFINITIONS )
  )
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SMSOH
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SMSOH.SS_CD
  WHERE SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SMSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
  )
  )                            
  
  UNION ALL 
  
  SELECT ORDER_HOLD_ID ,
  ATTRIBUTE1 ,
  CREATION_DATE ,
  HEADER_ID ,
  HOLD_RELEASE_ID ,
  HOLD_SOURCE_ID ,
  LINE_ID ,
  HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT ,
  CREATED_BY ,
  LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
  LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
  ORG_ID ,
  GLOBAL_NAME ,
  CREATE_DATETIME ,
  'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
  FROM  
   $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SUOOHA
  WHERE
  SUOOHA.LINE_ID IS NULL
  AND SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME = 'OPL'
  AND SUOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND(
  NOT EXISTS 
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSO.SS_CD)
  WHERE SUOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME  
  
  
  )
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_HOLD SMSOH
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SMSOH.SS_CD
  WHERE SUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SMSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
  )
  )

SELECT
ORDER_HOLD_ID,
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,
HOLD_SOURCE_ID,
HOLD_RELEASE_ID,
CAST('CG' AS VARCHAR(3)) AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ORG_ID,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CASE WHEN SOURCE_DML_TYPE ='DELETE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
 $$NRTSTGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORD_HOLDS_ALL_HLDNRT  SCOOHAN
 WHERE SCOOHAN.LINE_ID IS NULL 


UNION ALL

SELECT
ID ,
CAST( ST_SI.HEADER_ID AS INTEGER),
CAST (ST_SI.LINE_ID AS INTEGER) ,
CAST(ST_SI.HOLD_SOURCE_ID AS INTEGER),
0 AS HOLD_RELEASE_ID,
'OPL' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
ST_SI.HOLD_APPLY_REASON AS ATTRIBUTE1,
CAST(ST_SI.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE AS VARCHAR(240)) AS ATTRIBUTE2,
-1 CREATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(ST_SI.CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19))AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
-1 LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(ST_SI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19))AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
ST_HDR.ORG_ID,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
from
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOPL_HOLD_DATA ST_SI
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL ST_HDR
ON ST_HDR.HEADER_ID = ST_SI.HEADER_ID
AND ST_HDR.ORDER_ORIGIN = 'CLOUD-CBM'
WHERE ST_SI.LINE_ID IS NULL
AND ST_SI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(JOB_STREAM_START_TIME),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) - INTERVAL '1' DAY)  
FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAM_RUNS 
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT' 
AND JOB_STREAM_END_TIME IS NOT NULL)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ID ORDER BY ST_SI.LAST_UPDATED_DATE DESC)=1
